title: Service of process; delay for answer
doc_html:
Art. 4655.  Service of process; delay for answer

Service of citation and a copy of the petition in a concursus proceeding shall be made in the same form and manner, and the delays for answering are the same, as in an ordinary proceeding.
doc_text:
